_comment: List of bundled sample audio files. Each entry needs file (relative to this folder), name (shown in the picker), and optional category. Add a file here and it will appear in the 'Bundled samples' picker that opens when you click 'Load file...' on any oscillator. Supported formats: WAV / MP3 / OGG / FLAC / AIF.
_addInstructions: 1) Drop your file into web/samples/  2) Append an entry below  3) Commit and the app picks it up after deploy. Browsers can't enumerate a static folder, which is why we need this manifest.
